positive: A stylized, detailed, geometric pattern featuring abstract constellations and celestial bodies (moon, planets, stars). The overall composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a textile repeat. Use a dark navy and cosmic teal color palette with glowing white and gold accents for contrast. The pattern should have clean, bold outlines and a modern, ethereal feel, optimized for printing on fabric. Mid-century modern illustration style meets sacred geometry, high contrast, clean silhouette, minimal shading.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, ugly, low quality, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, noise, cartoon, photorealism
